query:
SELECT ac.id, ac.trelloId, ac.name, ac.boardId, ab.name as boardName, ab.trelloId as boardTrelloId, ac.createdAt 
FROM atis_cards ac 
LEFT JOIN atis_boards ab ON ac.boardId = ab.id 
WHERE ac.name IN ('Blog post - Announcement', 'In-App Announcement', 'Email Newsletter', 'Social promotion', 'Marketing Training on Power-Ups')
ORDER BY ac.name, ac.createdAt;
command:

FROM atis_cards ac 
LEFT JOIN atis_boards ab ON ac.boardId = ab.id 
WHERE ac.name IN ('Blog post - Announcement', 'In-App Announcement', 'Email Newsletter', 'Social promotion', 'Marketing Training on Power-Ups')
ORDER BY ac.name, ac.createdAt;
